policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.recognition_basis_en: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.recognition_basis_zh: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.snippet_en: is tracked internally for operational purposes and for Scope 3 reporting. Calculation Methodology The main methodology for calculating Scope 2 emissions from electricity is the market-based approach, using site-specific emissions factors by plant according to supplier contracts and utility bills, where available. For sites where such market-based factors are not known, Linde uses the most recent location-based factors from the IEA and the EPA’s eGRID factors for the U.S. 305-1 Scope 1 GHG Emissions 2021 2022 2023 2024 Scope 1 16,321,000 16,813,000 16,582,000 16,470,000 Scope 2 GHG Emissions (Market-based) 2021 2022 2023 2024 Scope 2 23,573,000 21,981,000 21,562,000 20,943,000 EN (7): Scope 1 GHG Emissions Units: Metric Tons CO2e EN (8): Scope 2 GHG Emissions Units: Metric Tons CO2e
records.snippet_zh: is tracked internally for operational purposes and for Scope 3 reporting. For sites where such market-based factors are not known, Linde uses the most recent location-based factors from the IEA and the EPA’s eGRID factors for the U.S. 305-1 Scope 1 GHG Emissions 2021 2022 2023 2024 Scope 1 16,321,000 16,813,000 16,582,000 16,470,000 Scope 2 GHG Emissions (Market-based) 2021 2022 2023 2024 Scope 2 23,573,000 21,981,000 21,562,000 20,943,000 EN (7): Scope 1 GHG Emissions Units: Metric Tons CO2e EN (8): Scope 2 GHG Emissions Units: Metric Tons CO2e
records.original_snippet_en: Manual PDF-page validation accepted this direct-use Scope value. Source file: 2024-LINDE-sustainable-development-report.pdf. PDF page: 59. Reported value: 20,943,000 tCO2e. Scope 2 reporting method: Market-Based.
records.original_snippet_zh: 已逐页核对 PDF 原文、Scope 语境、数值和单位换算；该行进入直接采信层。 Scope 2 口径：Market-Based。
